requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Niger National Conformity, ARSE/NIGELEC, and Lender Review
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——尼日尔国家合格评定、ARSE/NIGELEC和贷款方审查
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——尼日國家合格評定、ARSE/NIGELEC和貸款方審查

summary.en: For PV inverters used in Niger, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the defensible safety evidence baseline for national conformity review, ARSE/NIGELEC project review, and donor/lender procurement. Niger standardisation practice is understood to adopt or reference international IEC standards where national solar-inverter rules are not separately published. Safety evidence should cover the exact inverter model or certified family, installation altitude and ambient temperature range, protective earthing, DC isolation, thermal protection, enclosure ingress protection, and operation in high heat and dust typical of Sahel sites.
summary.zh: 用于尼日尔的光伏逆变器，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是国家合格评定审查、ARSE/NIGELEC项目审查以及捐助方/贷款方采购中可辩护的安全证据基准。在未另行公开国家太阳能逆变器规则时，尼日尔标准化实践通常理解为采纳或引用国际IEC标准。安全证据应覆盖具体逆变器型号或认证系列、安装海拔和环境温度范围、保护接地、直流隔离、热保护、外壳防护等级，以及萨赫勒场址常见高温和沙尘条件下运行。
summary.zht: 用於尼日的光伏逆變器，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是國家合格評定審查、ARSE/NIGELEC項目審查以及捐助方/貸款方採購中可辯護的安全證據基準。在未另行公開國家太陽能逆變器規則時，尼日標準化實踐通常理解為採納或引用國際IEC標準。安全證據應覆蓋具體逆變器型號或認證系列、安裝海拔和環境溫度範圍、保護接地、直流隔離、熱保護、外殼防護等級，以及薩赫勒場址常見高溫和沙塵條件下運行。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Niger national conformity and standards-adoption review where applicable
ARSE / NIGELEC / project-owner technical documentation requirements where applicable

summary.en: China-side PV inverter safety files commonly reference GB/T 37408 and domestic CQC/CGC or laboratory reports. These documents may demonstrate useful design and production controls, but they are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates for Niger projects. Where Chinese reports are not issued against IEC 62109 by an internationally recognised laboratory, they should be treated as supporting evidence only.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全文件通常引用GB/T 37408以及国内CQC/CGC或实验室报告。这些文件可证明有用的设计和生产控制，但不会自动等同于尼日尔项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证书。若中国报告并非由国际认可实验室按IEC 62109出具，应仅作为支持性证据处理。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全文件通常引用GB/T 37408以及國內CQC/CGC或實驗室報告。這些文件可證明有用的設計和生產控制，但不會自動等同於尼日項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證書。若中國報告並非由國際認可實驗室按IEC 62109出具，應僅作為支持性證據處理。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary PV inverter certification schemes where used by the manufacturer

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T safety evidence does not remove the need for IEC 62109-1/-2 model coverage where Niger authorities, NIGELEC, ARSE, project owners, or lenders request IEC evidence. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and reports, CB Test Certificate or ILAC-accredited laboratory evidence where available, model-family mapping, bill-of-materials change control, installation manual in French where required, and derating curves for operation at 45 C or higher with dust-prone outdoor enclosures.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T安全证据不能消除尼日尔主管机构、NIGELEC、ARSE、项目业主或贷款方要求IEC证据时对IEC 62109-1/-2型号覆盖的需要。出口商应提供IEC 62109-1/-2证书和报告、可用时的CB测试证书或ILAC认可实验室证据、型号系列映射、物料清单变更控制、必要时的法语安装手册，以及在45 C或更高温度、易积尘户外外壳条件下运行的降额曲线。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T安全證據不能消除尼日主管機構、NIGELEC、ARSE、項目業主或貸款方要求IEC證據時對IEC 62109-1/-2型號覆蓋的需要。出口商應提供IEC 62109-1/-2證書和報告、可用時的CB測試證書或ILAC認可實驗室證據、型號系列映射、物料清單變更控制、必要時的法語安裝手冊，以及在45 C或更高溫度、易積塵戶外外殼條件下運行的降額曲線。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Niger national conformity, NIGELEC connection review, ARSE authorisation, project-owner, or donor/lender specifications require IEC inverter safety evidence; otherwise still a practical baseline for bankable PV procurement
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and domestic voluntary certification are China-side evidence; not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109 acceptance in Niger

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Provide IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence for the exact inverter model or certified family before Niger submission. China GB/T 37408 safety files can support the dossier but should not be presented as a substitute for IEC 62109 where NIGELEC, ARSE, national conformity authorities, or lenders request IEC evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在提交尼日尔项目文件前，应为具体逆变器型号或认证系列提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据。中国GB/T 37408安全文件可支持资料包，但在NIGELEC、ARSE、国家合格评定机构或贷款方要求IEC证据时，不应作为IEC 62109的替代品提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在提交尼日項目文件前，應為具體逆變器型號或認證系列提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據。中國GB/T 37408安全文件可支持資料包，但在NIGELEC、ARSE、國家合格評定機構或貸款方要求IEC證據時，不應作為IEC 62109的替代品提交。
